Verified Probate Section 850 Petition To Recover Funds Distributed From Trust To Beneficiaries Without First Satisfying Assignment Lien, And
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Continued To Apr-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The court advises that is inclined to stay this matter until the related civil matter is resolved.

After additional discussion, the court orders this matter stayed and is continued to Apr-11-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status of Stay is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Verified Probate Section 850 Petition To Recover Funds Distributed From Trust To Beneficiaries Without First Satisfying Assignment Lien, And
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court summarizes the last calling of this matter and of the court's notification that the petition would be taken off calendar if notice had not been filed and provided to the court, which has not been done. Ms. Calhoun advises that she filed an amended petition under probate section 17200 and has provided notice to all parties via U.S. mail. The court points to the last-minute filing of the amended petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Aug-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Verified Probate Section 850 Petition To Recover Funds Distributed From Trust To Beneficiaries Without First Satisfying Assignment Lien, And
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To Jun-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Ms. Calhoun discuss the notice issue with this petition. Ms. Calhoun testifies of a related civil matter wherein the parties are currently in settlement discussions and that she has asked the attorney in that matter to accept an acknowledgment of service and requests a continuance to allow time to resolve the civil matter. The court reminds Ms. Calhoun regarding the procedure concerning notice in probate proceedings.

The Petition is continued to Jun-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises Ms. Calhoun that if notice has not been provided and filed with the court by the next calling of this matter, the petition will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.
